title: {YTP} ~ Romney Puts On his Mitts
description:
If you check the upload dates, you'll see that I made the chainsaw joke before cs188 did. You know, because I'm hipster like that.

Making a YTP ≠ Political affiliation. Please keep comment debates to a minimum. Wouldn't want to have a sandal to deal with.

Really just a filler for those of you who prefer processed meat.

Support me: https://elliespectacular.com/support

FAQ: https://elliespectacular.com/faq
